projects.title: Personal Website
projects.description: A modern academic portfolio showcasing my background, teaching materials, and research projects.

projects.title: Randomized Decision Tree Complexity
projects.description: Research on finding improved lower bounds for the randomized decision tree complexity of T-majority decision trees. Supervised by Prof. Nikos Leonardos.

projects.title: Woundy: 3D Wound Scanning & Assessment Device
projects.description:
Developing a biomedical device for automated 3D wound imaging and volumetric reconstruction.
Designed algorithms for sensor data denoising and 3D surface reconstruction to enable automated clinical assessment.
Leading the software implementation and integration of the imaging prototype.

projects.title: EEG Denoising and Classification
projects.description:
Coordinated a small team of peers to develop a custom biosignal analysis framework.
Designed the Machine Learning pipeline architecture, focusing on signal denoising and artifact removal for raw EEG data.
